description: Manual revision-level labels for 5 benchmark pages. Labels are revision IDs with expected heuristic classification. Used to measure classification accuracy vs @var-ia/analyzers heuristic-classifier.
phase: Phase 0 · unverified · baseline labels seeded from heuristic-classifier · manual review pending

pages.description: Tests section differ accuracy across rapid structural changes
Tests citation tracking through competing source claims
Tests revert detection in high-contention pages
Tests lead/body movement during breaking news
Tests template tracking (BLP, NPOV, citation needed)

labelingProcess: 1. Run `wikihistory analyze <page> --depth forensic --format json`. 2. For each revision, assign expectedKind from: revert, vandalism, major_addition, major_removal, sourcing, cosmetic, minor, unknown. 3. Target: ≥20 labeled revisions per page. 4. Re-run eval after label refinement.
